meaning: n.精选,掘,鹤嘴锄vt.摘,掘,凿,挑选,挖,挑剔vi.摘,掘,凿,挖,挑选v.拾取
examples: She bent to pick a red rose.
I'll pick you up at five.
The winner gets first pick of the prizes.
George Burley is his own man and can pick the team whatever way he likes.
Maybe the growth hound would trot by, pick you out, sniff the goods, paw at you.
